passwall2.@global[0]=global
passwall2.@global[0].enabled=1
passwall2.@nodes[0]=nodes
passwall2.@nodes[0].type=Xray
passwall2.@nodes[0].protocol=vmess
passwall2.@nodes[0].remarks=HK-VMess-WS
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_address=hk1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_port=443
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_uuid=12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_security=auto
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_transport=ws
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_ws_host=hk1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_ws_path=/ws
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_tls=1
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_tls_serverName=hk1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[0].xray_fingerprint=chrome
passwall2.@nodes[1]=nodes
passwall2.@nodes[1].type=sing-box
passwall2.@nodes[1].protocol=trojan
passwall2.@nodes[1].remarks=US-Trojan
passwall2.@nodes[1].address=us1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[1].port=8443
passwall2.@nodes[1].password=mypassword123
passwall2.@nodes[1].tls=1
passwall2.@nodes[1].tls_serverName=us1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[1].transport=tcp
passwall2.@nodes[2]=nodes
passwall2.@nodes[2].type=Xray
passwall2.@nodes[2].protocol=vless
passwall2.@nodes[2].remarks=JP-VLESS-Reality
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_address=jp1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_port=443
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_uuid=87654321-4321-4321-4321-cba987654321
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_flow=xtls-rprx-vision
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_transport=grpc
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_grpc_serviceName=grpcsvc
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_reality=1
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_tls=1
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_tls_serverName=jp1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_fingerprint=chrome
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_publicKey=base64publickey
passwall2.@nodes[2].xray_shortId=abc123
passwall2.@nodes[3]=nodes
passwall2.@nodes[3].type=hysteria2
passwall2.@nodes[3].remarks=SG-Hysteria2
passwall2.@nodes[3].server=sg1.example.com
passwall2.@nodes[3].server_port=443
passwall2.@nodes[3].password=hysteria2pass
passwall2.@nodes[3].up_mbps=100
passwall2.@nodes[3].down_mbps=200
passwall2.@nodes[3].obfs_type=salamander
passwall2.@nodes[3].obfs_password=obfspass
passwall2.@nodes[3].auth_password=authpass
